prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025年青海大学在甘肃省理科（物理类）最低录取位次分别为约16221名→13994名→32523名→79978名→64800名。2023年出现明显断档，位次大幅后移；2024年因新高考改革及含民语类特殊专业（藏医学、藏药学），最低位次进一步扩大至约79978名；2025年回升至约64800名。剔除民语类特殊专业后，正常批次位次约在15000–23000名区间，但整体录取门槛较2021–2022年有所降低；该校在甘肃省理科（物理类）招生计划：2021年27人、2022年29人、2023年30人、2024年50人、2025年50人、2026年50人。2024年因新高考改革大幅扩招至50人后，2025–2026年连续两年持平，未进一步扩招，竞争压力未得到缓解。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 青海大学为211工程、国家双一流建设高校，软科中国大学排名约第198名（2025年），近年排名在180–200名区间波动，属于中后段211院校。学校位于青海省西宁市，是青海省唯一一所211高校；该校在近年声誉舆情监测中未出现明显正面或负面事件；抖音学校热度综合排名第106位，评价为"一般"，短视频平台曝光量较低，报考关注度处于中等偏下水平。历史投档异常记录中未见青海大学相关信号；根据第五轮学科评估数据，青海大学无A-及以上等级学科，优势学科主要集中在高原医学、生态学、草学、藏医药等领域，但未进入A类评级，学科竞争力相对有限。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 临床医学、口腔医学、电气工程及其自动化等专业社会热度持续偏高，计算机类热度有所降温但仍属推荐方向；土木建筑、生化环材等专业明显劝退。甘肃省2026年高考总报名人数约218700人，较2025年大幅增长；按近年物理类占比约67.5%估算，2026年物理类考生约147623人，较2025年121443人增长约21.5%，考生规模显著扩大，竞争加剧。2026年；青海大学位于青海省西宁市，与甘肃省相邻，属于西北地区高校，对甘肃考生具有天然的地缘亲近性。该校在甘肃招生计划占其省外招生比例较大，是甘肃考生报考西北地区211院校的重要选择之一。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合2025年基准位次约64800名、2026年招生计划持平（50人）以及甘肃省物理类考生规模大幅增长（约+21.5%）等因素，考生竞争压力明显加大。学校声誉平稳、学科竞争力一般，缺乏吸引高分考生的突出亮点。预计2026年最低录取位次将较2025年小幅后移，预测最低位次约65600名，位次区间65100–66100名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum admission rankings for Qinghai University in Gansu Province's science (physics category) were approximately 16221 → 13994 → 32523 → 79978 → 64800. In 2023, there was a clear gap, with rankings significantly dropping; in 2024, due to the new college entrance examination reform and the inclusion of special ethnic language majors (Tibetan Medicine, Tibetan Pharmacy), the minimum ranking further expanded to about 79978; in 2025, it rebounded to about 64800. Excluding special ethnic language majors, the normal batch ranking is approximately in the 15000–23000 range, but the overall admission threshold has decreased compared to 2021–2022; the enrollment plan for Qinghai University in Gansu Province's science (physics category): 27 in 2021, 29 in 2022, 30 in 2023, 50 in 2024, 50 in 2025, 50 in 2026. After a significant expansion to 50 in 2024 due to the new college entrance examination reform, the enrollment remained unchanged for two consecutive years in 2025–2026, with no further expansion, and competitive pressure has not been alleviated.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Qinghai University is a 211 Project and national Double First-Class construction university, ranking approximately 198th in the Soft Science China University Rankings (2025), with recent rankings fluctuating in the 180–200 range, placing it among mid-to-late 211 institutions. Located in Xining City, Qinghai Province, it is the only 211 university in Qinghai Province; in recent reputation monitoring, no significant positive or negative events have been observed; the university's Douyin popularity comprehensive ranking is 106th, rated as 'average', with low exposure on short video platforms and below-average application attention. No signals related to Qinghai University have been found in historical abnormal admission records; according to the fifth round of discipline evaluation data, Qinghai University has no A- or above disciplines, with advantageous disciplines mainly in plateau medicine, ecology, grass science, and Tibetan medicine, but none have entered the A-level rating, indicating relatively limited disciplinary competitiveness.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Geography
专业热度与地域.text: Majors such as Clinical Medicine, Stomatology, and Electrical Engineering and Automation continue to have high social popularity; computer-related majors have cooled somewhat but remain recommended; majors like civil engineering, biology, chemistry, environment, and materials are clearly discouraged. The total number of candidates for the 2026 Gansu Province college entrance examination is approximately 218,700, a significant increase from 2025; based on the recent physics category proportion of about 67.5%, the estimated number of physics category candidates in 2026 is about 147,623, an increase of about 21.5% from 121,443 in 2025, indicating a significant expansion in candidate scale and intensified competition. In 2026; Qinghai University is located in Xining City, Qinghai Province, adjacent to Gansu Province, and as a university in the northwest region, it has natural geographical affinity for Gansu candidates. Its enrollment plan in Gansu accounts for a large proportion of its out-of-province enrollment, making it an important choice for Gansu candidates applying to 211 institutions in the northwest region.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the 2025 baseline ranking of about 64800, the 2026 enrollment plan unchanged (50), and the significant increase in the number of physics category candidates in Gansu Province (about +21.5%), competitive pressure on candidates has clearly increased. The university's reputation is stable, disciplinary competitiveness is average, and it lacks outstanding highlights to attract high-scoring candidates. It is predicted that the minimum admission ranking in 2026 will slightly decline compared to 2025, with a predicted minimum ranking of about 65600, and a ranking range of 65100–66100.

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: Predicted ranking about 65600, ranking range 65100–66100. Candidates within this ranking range can seriously consider Qinghai University. It is recommended to focus on Tier 2 majors as the main direction for application, with Tier 1 majors as a sprint choice (Electrical Engineering, etc., historically have higher rankings), and Tier 3 majors as a safety net. Since Qinghai University has no A-level disciplines, it is advisable to prioritize majors with high social popularity and good employment prospects, such as electrical, computer, and related fields. Candidates with rankings significantly better than the upper limit (<65100) can focus on sprinting for popular Tier 1 majors.

prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 医学类专业近年来报考热度持续走高，临床医学、口腔医学等核心专业竞争尤为激烈。青海大学地处西北，距离甘肃较近，交通便利，学费适中，对甘肃省中等分数段考生具有 较高性价比。2026年医学类总计划13人，招生规模相对稳定，藏药学等特殊专业拉低了整体最低位次。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合M3供需弹性模型与历年位次趋势，预计2026年青海大学医学类在甘肃省最低录取位次约为63883名左右，较2025年略有上升（更难进），波动区间预计在63383至64383名之间 。建议考生结合自身位次合理定位，以二档专业为主、一档冲刺、三档保底。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: The minimum admission rankings for Qinghai University's medical programs in Gansu Province have fluctuated significantly over the past five years: 15,732 in 2021 (plan: 5 students), 11,489 in 2022 (plan: 5 students), 32,523 in 2023 (plan: 6 students), 69,943 in 2024 (plan: 14 students), and 64,800 in 2025 (plan: 14 students). In 2024, due to the new college entrance examination reform and a substantial expansion of medical enrollment (from 6 to 14 students), the ranking dropped significantly; in 2025, the plan remained unchanged, but the ranking rebounded by about 5,000 places, indicating a recovery in the popularity of medical applications. In 2026, the medical enrollment plan will be reduced to 13 students (a decrease of 1 student). The supply-demand elasticity model calculation shows that the reduction will cause a slight decline in ranking, but the upward trend in popularity will offset this.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Qinghai University is a key national university under the '211 Project' and is included in the 'Double First-Class' construction list. It is located in Xining City, Qinghai Province. As a comprehensive university in the northwest region, its medical school has a certain influence in the area, with clinical medicine, stomatology, and other majors having a long history of operation, providing sustained appeal to Gansu candidates.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Geography
专业热度与地域.text: In recent years, the popularity of medical majors has continued to rise, with core majors such as clinical medicine and stomatology being particularly competitive. Qinghai University is located in the northwest, close to Gansu, with convenient transportation and moderate tuition fees, offering high cost-effectiveness for middle-score candidates in Gansu Province. In 2026, the total medical enrollment plan is 13 students, with a relatively stable enrollment scale. Special majors such as Tibetan pharmacy lower the overall minimum ranking.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Based on the M3 supply-demand elasticity model and historical ranking trends, the minimum admission ranking for Qinghai University's medical programs in Gansu Province in 2026 is expected to be around 63,883, slightly higher (more difficult to enter) than in 2025, with a fluctuation range estimated between 63,383 and 64,383. It is recommended that candidates position themselves reasonably based on their own rankings, focusing on second-tier majors, using first-tier majors as a reach, and third-tier majors as a safety.

Tibetan pharmacy is a special enrollment for ethnic language candidates with a very low ranking; regular candidates can ignore it.
